name: hornet
description: Medium interaction SSH honeypot that supports multiple virtual hosts. Tool: https://github.com/czardoz/hornet. [SCAFFOLD generated from XORCISM.TOOL #561 by tool_to_connector.py — implement run() in run.py to map hornet output to the XORCISM findings model {assets, services, cpes, vulns}.]

parameters.name: target

parameters.name: file
parameters.help: Offline mode: a saved hornet output file to parse instead of running it live.
